top_signals.title: Gold Hovers Near $4,000 After Soft Inflation Print Slows Decline
top_signals.summary: Gold traded either side of $4,000 an ounce on Friday after the latest US inflation print tempered expectations for an interest-rate hike, capping a tumultuous week that saw bullion slump to the lowest since November.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: U.S.-Iran peace deal grants access to Tehran's nuclear sites, UN watchdog says
top_signals.summary: "The technical work has started, and we hope to be there soon," IAEA chief Rafael Grossi said at a news conference in Japan on Friday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: What Is the GENIUS Act? A Guide to U.S. Stablecoin Law
top_signals.summary: The GENIUS Act is the U.S. federal law that creates a regulatory framework for dollar-backed stablecoins. Signed into law on July 18, 2025, the law sets rules for who can issue payment stablecoins, what those tokens must be backed by, how holders can redeem them, and which regulators supervise the issuers. It is the first […]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: SpaceX plans Starlink mobile push into US consumer market
top_signals.summary: Move would test whether group can turn sky-high ambition into a mass-market phone business
